name: table
title: Table
description: Structured data table with header, body, footer, and caption.

files.content:
<script setup lang="ts">
import { computed } from 'vue'
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'

interface TableBodyProps {
    class?: string
}

const props = defineProps<TableBodyProps>()

const classes = computed(() =>
    cn(
        '[&_tr:last-child]:border-0',
        '[&_tr:nth-child(even)]:bg-brutal-muted',
        props.class
    )
)
</script>

<template>
    <tbody :class="classes">
        <slot />
    </tbody>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { computed } from 'vue'
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'

interface TableCaptionProps {
    class?: string
}

const props = defineProps<TableCaptionProps>()

const classes = computed(() =>
    cn('mt-4 text-sm font-bold text-brutal-muted-foreground', props.class)
)
</script>

<template>
    <caption :class="classes">
        <slot />
    </caption>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { computed } from 'vue'
import { type VariantProps } from 'class-variance-authority'
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'
import { tableFooterVariants } from '@/components/ui/table/table-variants'

type TableFooterVariantProps = VariantProps<typeof tableFooterVariants>

interface TableFooterProps {
    variant?: NonNullable<TableFooterVariantProps['variant']>
    class?: string
}

const props = withDefaults(defineProps<TableFooterProps>(), {
    variant: 'default',
    class: undefined,
})

const classes = computed(() =>
    cn(tableFooterVariants({ variant: props.variant }), props.class)
)
</script>

<template>
    <tfoot :class="classes">
        <slot />
    </tfoot>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { computed } from 'vue'

interface TableHeadProps {
    variant?: NonNullable<TableHeadVariantProps['variant']>
    class?: string
}

const props = withDefaults(defineProps<TableHeadProps>(), {
    variant: 'default',
    class: undefined,
})

const classes = computed(() =>
    cn(tableHeadVariants({ variant: props.variant }), props.class)
)
</script>

<template>
    <th :class="classes">
        <slot />
    </th>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { computed } from 'vue'
import { type VariantProps } from 'class-variance-authority'
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'
import { tableHeaderVariants } from '@/components/ui/table/table-variants'

type TableHeaderVariantProps = VariantProps<typeof tableHeaderVariants>

interface TableHeaderProps {
    variant?: NonNullable<TableHeaderVariantProps['variant']>
    class?: string
}

const props = withDefaults(defineProps<TableHeaderProps>(), {
    variant: 'default',
    class: undefined,
})

const classes = computed(() =>
    cn(tableHeaderVariants({ variant: props.variant }), props.class)
)
</script>

<template>
    <thead :class="classes">
        <slot />
    </thead>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { computed } from 'vue'
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'
import { tableRowVariants } from '@/components/ui/table/table-variants'

interface TableRowProps {
    class?: string
}

const props = defineProps<TableRowProps>()

const classes = computed(() =>
    cn(tableRowVariants(), props.class)
)
</script>

<template>
    <tr :class="classes">
        <slot />
    </tr>
</template>
